{{Card Infobox|Whistle||2|}}{{Keyword Infobox|Stunned|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Exhaust|2}}
{{C|Whistle||2}} is a 3 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} Card. 

== Obtaining Whistle ==
Can be obtained by taking {{R|Tanx's Whistle||2}} from {{KW|Tanx||2}}'s offering at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 3|Act 3]].

== Notes ==
*The turn after being {{KW|Stunned|Stunned|2}}, the enemy will generally repeat the [[Intent|Intent]] that was interrupted.
**If an enemy has already {{KW|Stunned|Stunned|2}} itself that turn, or if {{C|Whistle||2}}'s damage triggers the enemy's {{KW|Stunned|Stun|2}} mechanic, {{C|Whistle||2}}'s {{KW|Stunned|Stun|2}} will not affect the enemy's intents.
*Stuns the enemy even if it has {{BD|Artifact||2}}, as {{KW|Stunned|Stun|2}} is not treated as a debuff.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Whistle to the game.
